sharedRules.name: Reload
sharedRules.description: Once used, a unit cannot use any ability with this tag until it reloads. To reload, sacrifice a MOVE. Other abilities may allow a reload for free.

sharedRules.name: Headshot
sharedRules.description: Effect that triggers when rolling a 6 on the final attack roll.
